evals.prompt: Create a new shared DOM dialog for web and extension only. It does not need a React Native counterpart.
evals.expected_output: Use ui-component-scaffold, choose the DOM-only branch, keep the props local to packages/ui, use ../../utils/styled, update the component barrel and packages/ui main barrel, and avoid creating a shared contract in packages/shared/src/types/ui.

evals.prompt: Create the DOM implementation for a component that will also exist in mobile, and keep the semantic contract shared.
evals.expected_output: Use ui-component-scaffold, choose the cross-platform branch, create or extend the shared PropsBase contract in packages/shared/src/types/ui, extend it locally with CSSProperties, and update all relevant barrels.
